title: rottboellia coelorachis
intro: Rottboellia coelorachis, also known as the Black Panic Grass or Panic Grass, is a type of tropical grass native to Africa and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rottboellia coelorachis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Rottboellia coelorachis is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
